name: In Good Company series — BioTech & Life Sciences Networking Mixer
description:
Join UpSurge for our final event in the In Good Company series — BioTech & Life Sciences Networking Mixer! Hosted by @connectlabs.wexford! Connect with Baltimore’s BioTech and life science community. Meet founders, researchers, clinicians, engineers, and industry leaders working across therapeutics, diagnostics, medtech, digital health, and research tools in Maryland.

🕔 5–6 PM: Focus group on BMore Tech Connect
Share your feedback on the Pathways feature and help shape a stronger, more connected life sciences ecosystem.
💵 First 40 participants get a $50 Visa gift card
🔬 Participants can apply for click testing for an extra $250
🍽️ 6–8 PM: Dinner + networking

Keep the conversation going over food and meet potential collaborators, advisors, hires, and partners.

📍 University of Maryland BioPark | 4MLK
4 N. Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd, Baltimore, MD 21201

name: Baltimore Mutual Aid Fair
description: Free food, free clothing, and free toiletries. Featuring DJ Ryan Da Lion.

name: Baltimore Data Day 2026
description: The 17th annual Baltimore Data Day is a free public event hosted by the Baltimore Neighborhood Indicators Alliance (BNIA), bringing residents, community leaders, government representatives, advocates, agencies, and analysts together to move from data to stories to action. Presentations and workshops focus on data availability, accessibility, and practical community use. Registration is required and space is limited. A related virtual community brainstorming session is scheduled for Friday, May 15, 2026 from 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM on Zoom.

name: Columbia Community Care Weekly Food Distribution
description: Weekly recurring community food distribution and service opportunity hosted by Columbia Community Care every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM.
